chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Etiquettes of the Fasting Person, What Invalidates the Fast, and What Does Not Invalidate it

text: 1872 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْحَسَنِ بْنِ رَاشِدٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: كَانَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِذَا صَامَ تَطَيَّبَ بِالطِّيبِ وَ يَقُولُ «اَلطِّيبُ تُحْفَةُ اَلصَّائِمُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1872 - It was narrated from Hasan ibn Rashid that he said:
"When Abu Abdullah (as) fasted, he would apply perfume and say, 'Perfume is a gift for the fasting person.'"
